tools.name: get_fundamentals
tools.description: SEC-derived annual fundamentals (revenue, net income, assets, margins; plus price-based valuation when available) for a US public company, by ticker symbol. Data traces to SEC EDGAR filings.

tools.name: screen_companies
tools.description: Find US public companies whose latest-fiscal-year fundamentals match filters (minimum revenue, margins, ROE, growth; sector; profitable-only), sorted and limited. Returns a ranked list of companies with their key figures. Data traces to SEC EDGAR filings.
